  • Package

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    BaseEntrantActivity
    Base activity for entrant screens with shared bottom navigation behavior.
    CameraQRActivity
    Activity for scanning a qr code with the camera
    CreateEventActivity
    Controller/Activity screen for handling the creation of a new event.
    DeviceIdProvider
    Utility class for getting and validating the device ID used by the app.
    Entrant
    Model class representing a single entrant record stored in an event waitlist.
    EntrantAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter used to display entrants in the organizer waitlist screen.
    EntrantDashboardActivity
    Entrant dashboard showing all available events ("Discover Events").
    EntrantEventAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for displaying events on the entrant dashboard.
    EntrantEventAdapter.OnEntrantEventClickListener
    Click listener interface for entrant event cards.
    EntrantEventDetailActivity
    Event detail screen for entrants.
    EntrantListActivity
    Organizer screen for viewing entrants who joined a specific event waitlist.
    EntrantMyEventsActivity
    My Events screen showing the entrant's registered events grouped by status.
    EntrantNotificationsActivity
    Entrant notifications screen.
    EntrantQRCodeActivity
    Activity for the scanning qr code screen
    Event
    Model class representing an event with lottery and requirement settings.
    EventAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for displaying events on the organizer dashboard.
    InfoPopup
     
    ManageEventActivity
    Organizer screen for managing a specific event.
    NotificationActionHelper
    Pure helper methods used by the notification UI and tests.
    NotificationAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for entrant notifications.
    NotificationAdapter.Listener
     
    NotificationItem
    Model representing a single entrant notification stored in Firestore.
    NotificationRepository
    Repository for reading and updating entrant notifications.
    NotificationRepository.NotificationListener
    Callback interface for listening to real-time notification changes.
    OnEventClickListener
    Listener interface for organizer event card actions.
    OrganizerDashboardActivity
    Organizer dashboard screen that displays summary statistics and event cards.
    ProfileActivity
    Activity for viewing and updating entrant profile information.
    ProfileInitializer
    Helper class for checking whether a profile exists in Firestore and creating it if it does not.
    ProfileInitializer.Callback
    Callback used after checking or creating a profile.
    QRCodeGenerator
    Utility model class for generating QR codes from text data.
    SelectRoleActivity
    Role selection screen shown on app launch.
    WaitlistController
    Controller handling Waitlist business logic, including the Lottery system.
    WaitlistMapActivity
    Organizer screen that displays a map of where entrants joined an event waitlist.
